attributes.rationale: PGY-4 vascular surgery resident, academic chief. Agility d8 for fine-motor microsurgery (anastomoses, endarterectomies) reinforced by lapsed TKD. Insight d8 for diagnostic pattern recognition and explicit system-builder temperament. Perception d8 for OR vigilance and clinical noticing (pulses, warm feet, ulcers). Will d8 for chief-of-residents command, schedule-building, and mediating attendings/juniors. Strength and Might held at baseline d6: 5'11" 140lb slim build, not an endurance athlete; long shifts notwithstanding, the profession's load is cognitive and fine-motor, not muscular. No d10 — selected academic chief is professionalism, not the genuine outlier excellence the d10 reserves.

skills.rationale: Vascular surgery cluster at professional ceiling: surgery 5, first_aid 5, pharmacology 4, field_medicine 3 (vascular emergencies and trauma exposure at Bellevue/VA). Literacy 4 and bureaucracy 3 from academic chief duties — curriculum, charting, publication-adjacent work. Command 3 and instruction 3 from running the resident education curriculum and mediating between attendings and juniors. Negotiation 2 from the same mediator role. Brawling 2 from lapsed Tae Kwon Do. History 2 and tactics 2 from stated military history reading and action RPG interest. Urban_movement 1 from Manhattan daily life.

npcs.name: Dr. Rao (father)
npcs.notes: Vascular surgeon in Newark, Delaware. Inventive, scattered, entrepreneurial. Same specialty as Shake — admiration mixed with the friction of two surgeons in one family.

npcs.name: Dr. Rao (mother)
npcs.notes: Retired general surgeon, Newark, Delaware. Grounded counterweight to the father.

npcs.name: Akhil Rao
npcs.notes: Younger brother. Medical student at Mount Sinai — also in Manhattan.

npcs.name: Grandmother (paternal/maternal)
npcs.notes: Lives with extended family in Bergen County, NJ.

npcs.name: Aunt (Bergen County)
npcs.notes: Bergen County, NJ — sibling of one of Shake's parents.

npcs.name: Uncle (Bergen County)
npcs.notes: Bergen County, NJ — partner of the aunt.

npcs.name: Denice
npcs.notes: College friend. OBGYN in Chicago. Kind, quiet, iconoclastic.

npcs.name: Alex
npcs.notes: College friend. Radiologist in Philadelphia. Laconic, fearless.

npcs.name: Bella
npcs.notes: College friend. Finance career. Organized, busy.

npcs.name: Henry
npcs.notes: Med school friend. Ophthalmologist in Boston. Gregarious.

npcs.name: Saurabh
npcs.notes: Med school friend. Cardiologist in San Diego. Analytical.

npcs.name: Jason
npcs.notes: Senior co-resident at NYU. Wry, joking, blunt. Closest among coworkers.

npcs.name: Jessica
npcs.notes: Junior co-resident at NYU. Kind, blunt, efficient.

npcs.name: Zyra
npcs.notes: Peer co-resident. Bubbly. Shake doesn't know her well.

npcs.name: Kyle
npcs.notes: Senior co-resident. Anxious and fiery, but protective of his juniors.

inventory_seeds.name: Surgical loupes
inventory_seeds.description: 2.5x magnification, custom-fit, well-worn case. The single most personal piece of professional kit Shake owns.

inventory_seeds.name: Penlight
inventory_seeds.description: Aluminum, scratched. Pupillary check, throat, the dark inside a wound.

inventory_seeds.name: Battered military history paperback
inventory_seeds.description: Spine cracked, dog-eared. Half-read on call-room nights.
